options.name: -cUnit
options.description: Specifies the unit of capacitance as fF or pF in the output SPEF file.

options.name: -excNetFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the file that contains nets to be excluded from the output file

options.name: -excludeIlm
options.description: Writes out only top spef in rc out.

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies the name of the input file that contains the net names to be extracted. The default is to Extracts all net names.

options.name: -netName
options.description: Specify the name of the net to be written in spef file. The default is to write all nets.

options.name: -noRes
options.description: Generates a SPEF file without the resistance information. The SPEF file generated by this parameter can only be used to improve the performance of third-party simulator tools in early stages of the design.

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: Specifies the RC corner that is used to generate the output SPEF file in the multi-corner flow.

options.name: -spef
options.description: Specifies the name of the SPEF output file.

options.name: -useEEQCellWithLibertyInfo
options.description: Writes EEQ master cell in case EEQ cells are present

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies that the RC corner associated with the specified view is used to generate the output SPEF file in the multi-corner flow.
